metadata.title: dovo — stronger in pairs
metadata.description: A training partnership, reinforced by AI. Pair up, pick your sport, and turn your real body into the character you level up — together.

hero.label1: A training partnership, reinforced by AI.

statement.title: Discipline, shared
statement.body: Solo apps optimize habits. Couple apps optimize check-ins. dovo optimizes the contract between two people who made their training a shared promise.
statement.pactAlt: Two people seal their training pact with a handshake at the gym.

evidence.labelDuo: drop out when someone is counting on them
evidence.body: Starting alone is the number-one reason you stop. dovo turns «I'll start» into something another person is waiting for — and that changes everything.
evidence.source: 12-month adherence, partnered vs. solo. Wallace, Raglin & Jastremski · J. Sports Med. Phys. Fitness, 1995

process.title:
How it
works.
process.desc: A continuous loop, not a 30-day challenge. Show up weekly. Climb monthly. Hold the streak.
process.s1Body: Invite anyone — a partner, a friend, a rival. Two people or a whole group. Symmetric: you both put in, you both get out.
process.s2Body: Gym, running, pilates, ballet — each with structured metrics. You don’t have to do the same thing. Each trains their own routine.
process.s3Body: AI converts effort to points, normalized to your own body via BMR. The system measures you against your target, not someone else’s.
process.s4Body: Climb infinite tiers, hold the streak, unlock real rewards. Every milestone exports as a card to share.

stories.title:
Stories that
speak louder.
stories.desc: Real duos. Real change. Tracked by the system, owned by the people who built it — and theirs to share.

system.title: The system.
system.desc: A game where your real body is the character. Six stats, infinite levels, streaks that earn real rewards.
system.c1Body: Every workout maps to Strength, Endurance, Flexibility, Velocity, Equilibrium, Vitality. Read your character sheet like a player.
system.c2Body: Climb from Novice to Legend. Reset with prestige and start over with a badge that says you’ve proved it once.
system.c3Body: The unit of consistency is a week. Each week you both hit target, the streak grows. Each week you don’t, it holds.
system.c4Body: Personalized nutrition, monthly with weekly tweaks. Tell it you hated quinoa once. It won’t ask again.
system.c5Body: Optional photo. AI Vision reads composition. Image deleted in 60 seconds — only the numbers stay, only you see them.
system.c6Body: Your wishlist + partner discounts + AI-suggested gear. Unlocked by the streak you hold, not the level you sit on.

pricing.title: Pricing.
pricing.desc: Free for the first 200 duos. Everything that defines the product is in the free tier.

share.title: Built to share.
share.desc: Wins go further when they travel. Every milestone exports as a vertical card.
share.body: Every level up, every streak hit, every duo bond exports as a vertical card — sized for stories, reels, and feeds. One tap. Your name on it.
share.mockLabel: levels gained with Bruno in 14 weeks

final.h2:
Your streak starts

when you both show up.
final.body: Free for the first 200 duos. No card needed. Bring someone who decided your discipline is their business too.

signUp.title: Start your duo
signUp.subtitle: Start with Google or your email.
signUp.sentBody: We sent you a link to get into dovo.
signUp.legal: By continuing you accept the <terms>Terms</terms> and the <privacy>privacy notice</privacy>.
signUp.footer: Already have an account? sign in here.

legal.spanishNotice: These legal documents are maintained in Spanish for our Mexican jurisdiction. The Spanish version is the authoritative one.
legal.delIntro: You can delete your dovo account and personal data anytime, free of charge. Here's what gets deleted and how.
legal.delItemPerfil: Your profile, weight, height, age and other physical and health data.
legal.delItemNutri: Your nutrition data: restrictions, allergies, vetoed and favorite foods, budget.
legal.delItemJuego: Your check-ins, workouts, levels and your participation in groups and duels.
legal.delItemLogin: Your login is disabled and your name and email are anonymized.
legal.delConservaLegal: Whatever the law requires us to keep, only for the period that obligation demands.
legal.delConservaDisoc: Statistical data already disassociated that, by design, does not identify you and is irreversible.
legal.delComoLogueado: Your session is active. You can delete your account right now with the button below (or from Settings → delete account).
legal.delComoNoLogueado: To delete your account, sign in and return to this page, or do it from Settings → delete account inside the app.
legal.delSinAcceso: Can't sign in? Email privacidad@dovofit.com from your account's address and we'll delete it for you, per our privacy notice.

aviso.body: we updated our privacy notice: it now explains how we build anonymous statistics to get you better brand rewards. your health data is never sold. we need your okay to continue.

home.boostActiveEnergia: energy +50% ready for your next check-in
home.atkBannerGolpe: you took a hit — the duel score felt it.
home.atkBannerFreeze: you got frozen — 12h without scoring in the duel.
home.todayNoGroup: join a group to start logging your activity.
home.proUpsellBody: AI meal plans, body analysis and premium discounts. one subscription for both of you.
home.sinSaludBody: you declined to share your health data. the social layer (vow, bets, group, rivals) is available, but your meal plans, prescribed workouts, and level are paused. you can enable them whenever you want.

duoProof.labelDuo: when someone is counting on them
duoProof.body: It isn't willpower. People who start with someone counting on them keep the habit. dovo is built on that single fact.
duoProof.source: 12-month adherence, partnered vs. solo · Wallace, Raglin & Jastremski, 1995

perfil.attributesNote: every check-in raises your attributes and your level. your class shifts with what you excel at.
perfil.scanCtaSub: estimate your body composition and get recommendations

ajustes.title: your account
ajustes.name: Name
ajustes.saludConsentDesc: with your express permission, dovo will read metrics from your health apps (steps, heart rate, distance) to validate workouts and tune your plan. it's sensitive data: only you see it, it's never sold, it never enters statistics.
ajustes.ubicacionDesc: used only to anchor your gym and validate you actually went: one point at check-in time plus a distance summary when you run. we never store your route.
ajustes.fuentesDesc: direct connection ships with the native app. sign up and we'll let you know the moment it's live.
ajustes.stravaDesc: connect strava and your runs and rides validate your workouts on their own — distance, pace and summary, nothing logged by hand.
ajustes.pulseDesc: Pulse is the anonymized layer that measures how many people hit their goals and what kinds of prizes duos pick (movies, food, trips…) — those aggregates help us land brand discounts for everyone. No one sees your individual data or your texts, only counts. You can turn it off anytime.
ajustes.pushPitch: we only ping you when it matters: streak at risk or your duo moving. zero spam.
ajustes.pushDenied: the browser blocked the permission — enable it in site settings.
ajustes.pushUnsupported: your browser doesn't support alerts. on iPhone: add dovo to your home screen (share → add to home) and come back here.
ajustes.cancelarAviso: this action is irreversible. your profile, check-in history, workouts, meals, and participation in groups or duels will be deleted immediately. your user will be anonymized to protect your duos' history.

onboarding.perfilSubtitle: we use this to estimate your metabolism and tune your targets.
onboarding.grupoSubtitle: dovo is for two or more. create a group or join one.
onboarding.consentSalud: I agree to dovo processing my health data (weight, height, age, injuries) to generate my plans, validate my activity and show my progress. it's sensitive data: only I see it, it's never sold and never enters statistics. I can revoke this anytime from settings.
onboarding.errInvite: paste the invite link or code
onboarding.inviteLabel: paste the invite link or code

grupo.creator: creator
grupo.inviteSubtitle: share this link so they can join the group.
grupo.leaveAviso: you'll stop seeing this duo's progress and your check-ins for this group will be deleted. your partner stays in the group. you can rejoin with the invite code.
grupo.leaveAvisoUltimo: you're the only member: leaving archives the group. your check-ins for this group are deleted. this can't be undone.

invite.inactive: this group is no longer active
invite.signupPrompt: create your account to join the group.
invite.joinPrompt: {tipo} group. joining starts sharing your fitness progress with the team.

rutina.title: your routine
rutina.subtitle: pick your weekly activities. each one adds points to your stats.
rutina.planSubtitle: your prescribed week: what to execute each day for your goal.
rutina.preAviso: ok — go easy on anything loading that area. marked exercises say «take care today»: drop weight or swap the movement, you're in charge.
rutina.logEmptyError: add at least one set with reps
rutina.configHint: changing your disciplines regenerates the weekly plan.
rutina.noFisicoBody: with your weight, height and goal we build the prescription.
rutina.checkinReminder: you logged exercises — close it with your check-in on today's card.
rutina.noPlanHint: save your disciplines and your prescribed week shows up here.

leaderboard.title: duo leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: effort normalized by BMR. any discipline, comparable.
leaderboard.emptyTitle: no duos on the board yet
leaderboard.emptyBody: be the first duo to show up. start yours and rack up points.

retos.title: duo vs duo duels
retos.subtitle: challenge another duo. most points in 7 days wins.
retos.newSubtitle: the duel runs 7 days. most normalized points wins.
retos.pickRivalHint: no other duos to challenge yet — once more duos join the board, they show up here.
retos.emptyBody: challenge another duo and see who holds.
retos.atkPickRival: who do you freeze? (12h without scoring)
retos.atkNoAmmo: train today to unlock your attack
retos.atkUsed: you already attacked today — rematch tomorrow
retos.atkHitGolpe: clean strike! −10 to the rival score
retos.atkHitFreeze: frozen! 12h without scoring in this duel
retos.atkBlocked: blocked! the rivals had a shield — and it's spent
retos.atkFeedEmpty: no attacks yet — earn your ammo with today's check-in.
retos.atkNetError: couldn't confirm the attack — check the history.
retos.rematchSent: rematch sent — waiting on the rival

err.ataque_no_enviado: couldn't launch the attack — try again

boosts.title: boosts
boosts.choose: what do you give your duo?
boosts.cooldown: you already gave a boost this week
boosts.activeEnergia: energy +50% ready for your next check-in

recompensas.title: rewards
recompensas.subtitle: unlocked by your duo's streak. consistency, not level.
recompensas.wishlistSub: what each of you wants to earn — visible to the duo.
recompensas.partnersSub: partner discounts, unlocked by your streak.
recompensas.noGroupTitle: build your duo to earn rewards
recompensas.noGroupBody: rewards unlock with the streak the two of you keep.

showcase.heroSub: real effort, normalized by BMR. any discipline, one board.
showcase.boardSub: average points per person, this season.

suscripcion.title: your plan.
suscripcion.subtitle: one subscription per duo. either of you pays, both unlock.
suscripcion.footnote: we quote the price per person, but it's one subscription billed to the duo. yearly = almost 3 months free.
suscripcion.nutritionBlurb: weekly meal plans and grocery list, built for your goal.
suscripcion.bodyScanBlurb: composition estimate from a photo, with guaranteed deletion.
suscripcion.noDuoBody: the subscription belongs to the duo. create or join one to see the plans.

paywall.defaultBlurb: this unlocks with your duo's pro plan.

nutricion.title: your food.
nutricion.subtitle: weekly plan with grocery list, built for your goal and your metabolism.
nutricion.paywallBlurb: weekly meal plans personalized to your goal, restrictions and budget.
nutricion.noFisicoBody: the plan is computed from your metabolism. complete your physical profile to start.
nutricion.setupSubtitle: two minutes. this is how we build your weekly plan.
nutricion.formRestriccionesHint: mark the ones that apply — the AI plan fully respects them; the base plan is general.
nutricion.formMenus: how many distinct menus do you want?
nutricion.formMenusHint: fewer menus = shorter, cheaper grocery list · more = more variety. they rotate across your week.
nutricion.badgeDuo: duo plan · same dishes, your dose
nutricion.logSub: quick logging — no guilt, just data.
nutricion.disclaimer: orientative meal plan. not medical advice and no substitute for a health professional.

scan.title: your progress.
scan.subtitle: orientative body composition estimate — fat and muscle — with recommendations for your goal.
scan.paywallBlurb: estimate your composition and get concrete recommendations aligned to your goal.
scan.samplePitch: we estimate your composition from your profile data (weight, height, age). no photo, nothing to upload.
scan.consent1: I agree to upload a photo to estimate my body composition.
scan.consent2: I understand the photo is discarded after processing — only the result is kept.
scan.pickPhoto: take or pick a full-body photo
scan.pickHint: fitted clothes · even light · full body in frame
scan.privacyCountdown: processing — your photo is discarded when done
scan.resultSample: estimate from your data · no photo
scan.disclaimer: orientative estimate, not a diagnosis. not medical advice and no substitute for a health professional.

trato.statusNone: nobody trained today — the deal is waiting
trato.judgedSoon: the deal gets judged within the hour
trato.riskCopy: the deal's streak is at risk — there's still time
trato.brokenCopy: streak at zero · best run: {n} wk

veredicto.brokenSub: your best run is still there — the comeback starts today
veredicto.apuestaPagasTu: you cover {apuesta} — next week you push harder
veredicto.apuestaPerdida: {premio} stays on the table — it's earned by showing up

sello.title: it's a deal.
sello.body: two people, one promise. from today, each one delivers — or pays.

apuesta.ctaTitle: what's on the line this week?
apuesta.ctaSub: the prize you win together. the wager goes to whoever puts in less — simple, spicy.
apuesta.sheetTitle: what's on the line this week?
apuesta.premioLabel: the prize — you win it together
apuesta.siguienteTier: at {n} weeks you unlock «{tier}» — bigger prizes, already earned
apuesta.apuestaLabel: the wager — whoever ends up behind pays
apuesta.debesTu: you owe: {apuesta} — a promise is a debt

err.apuesta_campos: prize and wager — you need both
err.apuesta_cerrada: this week's wager is already closed
err.saldar_no_deudor: whoever owes doesn't get to absolve themselves

hud.ammoOn: strike loaded — use it in the duel
hud.ammoOff: train today to load your strike
hud.shield: shield up — blocks the next attack

errors.notFoundBody: the route you're looking for doesn't exist or moved. your streak is intact.
errors.errorBody: it wasn't you. retry — if it persists, write to us from settings.
